The improved summary clarifies this is a webhook receiver for status updates. data.current_summary: Save or update order via Zapier
data.summary_suggestion: Receive and process order status updates from Zapier
data.description_suggestion: Receives order status updates from Zapier and processes them in the Kutetailor order management system. This webhook endpoint accepts order data including status changes, custom production details, and order metadata. The operation validates the incoming payload, updates the corresponding order record in the system, and returns a confirmation response. Supports both new order creation and updates to existing orders. Side effects include modifying order state in the database and potentially triggering downstream workflows based on status changes.
data.reasoning: The current summary is vague about the actual purpose (webhook receiver vs. generic save/update). This enables AI agents to understand when to invoke this operation and what to expect.
